layers.title: Layer 1 — Telephony
layers.description: Twilio Media Streams WebSocket, μ-law decode/resample, barge-in

layers.title: Layer 2 — Voice Activity Detection
layers.description: Silero VAD (ONNX) per-frame, 700ms end-of-utterance, pre-roll buffer

layers.title: Layer 3 — Language Identification
layers.description: Custom ECAPA-TDNN (C=512) trained on IndicVoices + Svarah, ONNX inference, switching logic

subfeatures.title: identify_language() — ONNX inference with log-mel extraction
subfeatures.description: backend/core/language_id.py: lazy-load onnxruntime session, compute 80-dim log-mel spectrogram, run small ECAPA-TDNN model, softmax to 5 language codes (hi/en/ta/bn/mr), fallback to 'hi' on unavailable model

subfeatures.title: update_active_language() — switching logic
subfeatures.description: Pure function: confidence >= 0.80 AND word_count > 5 switches, first-utterance low-confidence defaults to 'hi', otherwise keeps current

subfeatures.title: training/ — build_dataset, augment, train_ecapa, export_onnx, eval_lang_id
subfeatures.description: backend/training/: streaming dataset builder from IndicVoices (hi/ta/bn/mr) + Svarah (en), telephony augmentation, PyTorch ECAPA-TDNN training loop, ONNX export with numerical validation, eval script for clean+degraded accuracy and latency p50/p95. Kaggle notebook (train_lang_id.ipynb) for cloud GPU (T4). Final: 87.1% val, 86.8% test, p95 6ms latency, ONNX max diff 4.77e-07, 0/1000 disagreements.

subfeatures.title: language_id tests — mock ONNX session
subfeatures.description: pytest with unittest.mock.patch: softmax label selection, confidence, resample handling, fallback on missing model, switching thresholds

subfeatures.title: Global rename te → ta (Tamil ISO code fix)
subfeatures.description: design.md, features.json, all backend files, tests: corrected erroneous 'te' → 'ta' for Tamil across the entire codebase

layers.title: Layer 4 — Speech-to-Text
layers.description: Moonshine Tiny ONNX Q8 ×5 models (hi/en/ta/bn/mr), warm-loaded, router by active_language

layers.title: Layer 5 — LLM Orchestration
layers.description: Groq API (Llama 3.1 8B), prompt builder, appointment extraction + validation, LangSmith tracing, rate-limit retry

layers.title: Layer 6 — Text-to-Speech
layers.description: Sarvam Bulbul v3, language-to-voice mapping, common phrase caching, 24kHz→8kHz resample

layers.title: Call State Machine
layers.description: GREETING → COLLECT_DETAILS → CHECK_SLOT → CONFIRM_SLOT → COMMITTING → DONE, Redis session CRUD (TTL 3600s)

layers.title: Data Layer — Postgres
layers.description: asyncpg pool, migrations (calls, appointments, doctor_slots, turn_metrics, language_events), optimistic slot locking, seed schedule

layers.title: Observability — LangSmith
layers.description: Trace all LLM calls with call_sid + language tags, per-call trace context

layers.title: Metrics & Evaluation
layers.description: TTFT, turn latency, language accuracy — 20 scripted test calls across 5 languages

layers.title: Admin Dashboard
layers.description: React + Vite frontend (Vercel), FastAPI REST endpoints, CORS

layers.title: Deployment
layers.description: Dockerfile, render.yaml, README with free-tier constraints + badges
